text: I feel a sense of anticipation mingled with curiosity as I enter this space. The glass, the fire extinguisher, the vibrant, patterned walls—they all set the stage for thought and innovation. Seeing "R+D" boldly displayed makes me eager to explore the boundaries of research and development, to ponder how ideas are born and grow. The slightly slanted perspective—even my viewpoint feels off-kilter, challenging me to realign my perception and consider new questions. This is a place that invites me to wonder, to question, to be intellectually restless, and I relish it.
